## Policy Change Request

**Document ID:** <!-- e.g. POL-001 -->
**Current version:** <!-- e.g. 2.0.0 -->
**New version:** <!-- e.g. 2.1.0 -->
**Effective date:** <!-- YYYY-MM-DD -->

### Summary of changes

<!-- Describe what changed and why -->

### Driver

- [ ] Regulatory requirement — cite: <!-- rule/reg -->
- [ ] Audit finding — ref: <!-- finding ID -->
- [ ] Periodic review
- [ ] Business change
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

### Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] Version number bumped in frontmatter
- [ ] `effective_date` updated
- [ ] `next_review_date` updated
- [ ] `status` set to `in-review` (CI will update to `published` on merge)
- [ ] Document owner has reviewed and approved
- [ ] Legal review completed (if required by tier)
- [ ] Revision history table updated in the document body
- [ ] No sensitive data (credentials, PII) included
